chunks.title: Lost Property and Fallen Beasts
chunks.reason: Laws regarding the return of lost livestock and helping fallen animals.

chunks.title: Various Statutes on Clothing and Agriculture
chunks.reason: Laws concerning mixed garments, gender-specific clothing, bird nests, roof parapets, and agricultural mixtures.

chunks.title: Cases of Virginity Disputes
chunks.reason: Legal procedures for a husband accusing his wife of non-virginity and the consequences if true or false.

chunks.title: Adultery and Fiancee Cases
chunks.reason: Laws regarding adultery with a married woman and the distinction between forced and voluntary relations with an engaged virgin.

chunks.title: Unmarried Virgin and Father's Wife
chunks.reason: Laws concerning a man seizing an unmarried virgin and the prohibition against taking a father's wife.
